title: Invitational Podracing Circuit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Invitational Podracing Circuit''' was a series of four [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] courses held on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] planets of [[Ando Prime/Legends|Ando Prime]], [[Ord Ibanna]], [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]], and [[Baroonda/Legends|Baroonda]] featuring longer and more difficult realignments of the courses found in the [[Galactic Podracing Circuit/Legends|Galactic Podracing Circuit]].

==Courses==
#[[Ando Prime Centrum/Legends|Ando Prime Centrum]]
#[[Abyss (Ord Ibanna)|Abyss]]
#[[The Gauntlet (Podrace course)/Legends|The Gauntlet]]
#[[Inferno (track)|Inferno]]

==Behind the scenes==
The tracks in the Invitational Circuit were unlocked by finishing first in all the races of the [[Amateur Podracing Circuit|Amateur]], [[Semipro Podracing Circuit|Semipro]], and [[Galactic Podracing Circuit/Legends|Galactic]] Podracing Circuits. Winning races in the Invitational Circuit would unlock the playable characters [[Slide Paramita]], [[Bozzie Baranta]], and [[Ben Quadinaros/Legends|Ben Quadinaros]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 1999-06-16 -->[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
